subcodes.first_line: He is Bahram! Through the bounty and magnanimity of the Lord, and the grace and nurturing care of the Creator, souls have been made new [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوست بهرام از بخشش و بزرگوارى پرودگار و دهش و پرورش کردگار جانهائی تازه شده
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
